zh.section_subtitle: 每张卡片对应一条长期研究主线：相图、输运、张量网络和方法学，不再只是装饰性推荐位。

cards.title: 量子计算 / Quantum Computing
cards.description: 量子金融与量子化学算法的开发与应用，探索量子计算在复杂系统模拟中的优势。

cards.title: 第一性原理 / First-Principles
cards.description: 基于密度泛函理论探究凝聚态体系中的磁性现象，理解电子结构与磁相互作用的本质。

cards.title: 微磁学 / Micromagnetics
cards.description: 自旋原子动力学模拟，探究磁空间演化和磁畴壁运动机制。

cards.title: Wannier 后处理 / Wannier Tools
cards.description: 开发 Wannier 函数后处理工具，计算非线性光学响应和电学输运性质。

en.section_subtitle: Each card points to a persistent research sector: phase atlas, transport, tensor networks, and methodology.

cards.title: Quantum Computing
cards.description: Development and application of quantum finance and quantum chemistry algorithms, exploring quantum advantages in complex system simulation.

cards.title: First-Principles
cards.description: DFT-based exploration of magnetism in condensed matter systems, understanding electronic structure and magnetic interactions.

cards.title: Micromagnetics
cards.description: Spin atomic dynamics simulation, exploring magnetic space evolution and domain wall motion mechanisms.

cards.title: Wannier Tools
cards.description: Post-processing tools for Wannier functions, computing nonlinear optical responses and electrical transport properties.
